[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100001111 5
2 101100110 5
3 001111000 4
4 101111110 7
5 101101111 7
6 001001010 3
7 110010000 3
